# Team Design Architects

> Architecture and interior design practice based in Mumbai, India.
> Founded 1996 by Tasadduq Kher (Rachana Sansad Academy of Architecture).
> 300+ completed projects, 500+ clients, 2M+ sq ft built. COA-registered.
> Services: Architectural Design, Interior Design, Sustainable Design,
> Corporate Design Guidelines.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://teamdesignarchitects.com/): Practice overview, credentials, and principal biography
- [Studio](https://teamdesignarchitects.com/studio): Firm history, values, services, and sustainability approach
- [Portfolio](https://teamdesignarchitects.com/portfolio): Completed projects filtered by Residential, Commercial, Institutional, and Interiors
- [Process](https://teamdesignarchitects.com/process): Five-phase project process with deliverables and typical timelines
- [Fees](https://teamdesignarchitects.com/fees): COA-compliant fee structure with project cost estimator
- [People](https://teamdesignarchitects.com/people): Principal architect and full team profiles
- [Contact](https://teamdesignarchitects.com/contact): Inquiry form, WhatsApp, and studio address
- [Journal](https://teamdesignarchitects.com/journal): Insights on architecture, process, materials, and sustainability

## Principal
Tasadduq Kher — B.Arch, Rachana Sansad Academy of Architecture, Mumbai.
Founded Team Design in 1996. Named one of India's 50 Most Talented Young
Architects Under 35 by Architects & Interiors India.

## Notable Clients
ICICI Bank, J&K Bank, Tata Capital, Kotak Mahindra Bank,
Kishore V. Mariwala (Marico), Ronnie Screwvala (UTV / UpGrad), ITM Group

## Awards & Recognition
- Named one of India's 50 Most Talented Young Architects Under 35 — Architects & Interiors India
- iGEN Design Forum — 50 young practitioners shaping Indian architecture
- Featured in DuPont India & Corian Women Leadership in Architecture & Design
